The '''Nduuati''' were a [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. [[Feyyaz Ferdusi]] was a Nduuati [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racer]].<ref name="BSS">''[[The Black Sands of Socorro]]''</ref>
